Language 🇫🇮 🇬🇧

🔗 Using the link shortener

With Sorola's link shortener you can turn long URLs into shorter links that are easier to share.

1. Enter the long address

Paste the web page address you want into the field.

Example:

https://esimerkki.fi/todella/pitka/osoite/joka/on/hankala/jakaa

2. Create a short link

Click the "Create link" button.

The service will automatically create a short address.

3. Share the link

You can share the short link, for example:

  • By email
  • On social media
  • In a QR code
  • In text messages

Privacy

The link shortener does not change the content of the original page. The short link only redirects to the original address.
